description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neck, half sleeves and inward print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not wring Do not bleach Do not scrub Dry flat in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Power up with the music of Agent 77 in this summery yellow t-shirt from united colors of benetton. The inward graphic print adds on a subtle style statement to this tee. Team it with jeans and sports shoes or shorts and casual footwear for that varied look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
